Operation 'get_homes_home_zones_zone_state' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary and description are identical and overly vague. They don't clarify what 'state' means in the Tado context (temperature, heating power, etc.) or what the response contains. Added specificity about return values and required parameters to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve current state of a zone
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current operational state of a specified zone, including temperature, heating power, and overlay status. Returns a state object containing the zone's current conditions and any active overrides. Requires home and zone identifiers.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are identical and overly vague. They don't clarify what 'state' means in the Tado context (temperature, heating power, etc.) or what the response contains. Added specificity about return values and required parameters to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'get_homes_home_zones_zone_capabilities' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary and description lack specificity about what capabilities are returned. Added context about temperature ranges, modes, and control features to help AI agents understand what information this operation provides and when to use it.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve zone capabilities and constraints
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the capabilities and constraints of a specified zone, including supported temperature ranges, heating modes, and control features. Returns a capability object defining what operations and settings are available for the zone. Requires home and zone identifiers.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description lack specificity about what capabilities are returned. Added context about temperature ranges, modes, and control features to help AI agents understand what information this operation provides and when to use it.

message: Operation 'get_homes_home_zones_zone_schedule_activeTimetable' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description doesn't explain what 'active' means or what data is returned. Added clarity that this returns the currently in-effect schedule (as opposed to other available schedules) and what information the response contains.

data.current_summary: Active schedule timetable of a zone
data.current_description: Active schedule timetable of a zone
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve currently active zone schedule
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the currently active timetable schedule for a specified zone. Returns the timetable object that is currently in effect, including its identifier and associated schedule blocks. This represents the zone's active heating schedule. Requires home and zone identifiers.
data.reasoning: Original description doesn't explain what 'active' means or what data is returned. Added clarity that this returns the currently in-effect schedule (as opposed to other available schedules) and what information the response contains.

message: Operation 'get_homes_home_zones_zone_schedule_timetables' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is too brief and doesn't clarify that this returns multiple timetables or what each timetable represents. Added context about the array response and that these are different schedule configurations available for the zone.

data.summary_suggestion: List all available zone schedules
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all available timetable schedules for a specified zone. Returns an array of timetable objects, each representing a different schedule configuration that can be applied to the zone. Requires home and zone identifiers.
data.reasoning: Original description is too brief and doesn't clarify that this returns multiple timetables or what each timetable represents. Added context about the array response and that these are different schedule configurations available for the zone.

message: Operation 'get_homes_home_zones_zone_schedule_timetables_timetable_blocks' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description doesn't explain what 'blocks' are in the scheduling context. Added clarity that blocks represent time periods with specific settings, and clarified the response structure and required parameters for AI agent understanding.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve schedule blocks for a timetable
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all schedule blocks (time periods with specific settings) for a specified timetable within a zone. Returns an array of timetable block objects, each defining a time period and its associated heating settings. Requires home, zone, and timetable identifiers.
data.reasoning: Original description doesn't explain what 'blocks' are in the scheduling context. Added clarity that blocks represent time periods with specific settings, and clarified the response structure and required parameters for AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'get_homes_home_weather' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary and description are identical and lack specificity about what weather data is returned. Added details about the types of weather information provided and context about how Tado uses this data, improving AI agent understanding of the operation's purpose and utility.

data.current_summary: Weather at location of a home
data.current_description: Weather at location of a home
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve weather conditions for home location
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves current weather information for the location of a specified home. Returns a weather object containing conditions such as temperature, humidity, and weather type. This data is used by Tado for intelligent heating optimization. Requires home identifier.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are identical and lack specificity about what weather data is returned. Added details about the types of weather information provided and context about how Tado uses this data, improving AI agent understanding of the operation's purpose and utility.

message: Operation 'get_me' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity about authentication requirements and specific return structure. Enhanced version clarifies what data is returned and authentication mechanism for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: The User Profile endpoint returns information about the Tado user that has authorized with the application. This includes the home and mobiledevices.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve authenticated user profile and devices
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the profile information of the authenticated Tado user, including associated homes and mobile devices. Requires OAuth2 authentication. Returns a profile object containing user details, home references, and registered mobile devices.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity about authentication requirements and specific return structure. Enhanced version clarifies what data is returned and authentication mechanism for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'get_homes_home' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary and description are identical and extremely vague. Added clarity about what the home ID parameter represents, what data is returned (home object structure), and authentication requirements. Improved actionability for AI agents.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve home configuration and details
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information about a specific home identified by the home ID parameter. Returns the complete home object including configuration, zones, devices, and installation status. Requires OAuth2 authentication and authorization to access the specified home.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are identical and extremely vague. Added clarity about what the home ID parameter represents, what data is returned (home object structure), and authentication requirements. Improved actionability for AI agents.

Original summary and description lack specificity. Enhanced version clarifies that this returns a list/array of zones, explains the home ID parameter requirement, describes the zone object structure, and specifies authentication needs for AI agent clarity.

data.summary_suggestion: List all zones in a home
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all zones configured within a specific home identified by the home ID parameter. Returns an array of zone objects, each containing zone configuration, capabilities, and current state. Requires OAuth2 authentication and authorization to access the specified home.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description lack specificity. Enhanced version clarifies that this returns a list/array of zones, explains the home ID parameter requirement, describes the zone object structure, and specifies authentication needs for AI agent clarity.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all Tado devices installed in a specific home identified by the home ID parameter. data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the installation process status for all devices in a specific home identified by the home ID parameter. data.reasoning: Original summary and description lack clarity about what installation data represents. message: Operation 'put_homes_home_zones_zone_overlay' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is acceptable but description is severely lacking. Enhanced description clarifies what an overlay is (temporary override), specifies required parameters, explains input/output, and describes side effects (persistence until deletion/expiration) for AI agent clarity.

data.description_suggestion: Creates or updates an overlay for a specific zone, allowing temporary override of the scheduled program. Requires home ID and zone ID parameters. Accepts overlay configuration in request body (temperature setpoint, duration, etc.). Returns the updated overlay object. This change persists until manually deleted or the overlay duration expires.
data.reasoning: Summary is acceptable but description is severely lacking. Enhanced description clarifies what an overlay is (temporary override), specifies required parameters, explains input/output, and describes side effects (persistence until deletion/expiration) for AI agent clarity.

message: Operation 'delete_homes_home_zones_zone_overlay' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and actionable. Description needs enhancement to specify required parameters, clarify return value, and explicitly state the side effect (immediate resumption of scheduled program) for better AI agent understanding of the operation's consequences.

data.current_summary: Delete overlay settings and return to scheduled program
data.current_description: Delete overlay settings and return to scheduled program
data.description_suggestion: Removes the active overlay for a specific zone, restoring the zone to its scheduled program. Requires home ID and zone ID parameters. Returns the updated zone state reflecting the removal of the overlay. The zone will immediately resume following its timetable schedule after this operation.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description needs enhancement to specify required parameters, clarify return value, and explicitly state the side effect (immediate resumption of scheduled program) for better AI agent understanding of the operation's consequences.

Operation 'get_homes_home_zones_zone_state' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary and description are identical and overly vague. They don't clarify what 'state' means in the Tado context (temperature, heating power, etc.) or what the response contains. Added specificity about return values and required parameters to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve current state of a zone
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current operational state of a specified zone, including temperature, heating power, and overlay status. Returns a state object containing the zone's current conditions and any active overrides. Requires home and zone identifiers.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are identical and overly vague. They don't clarify what 'state' means in the Tado context (temperature, heating power, etc.) or what the response contains. Added specificity about return values and required parameters to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'get_homes_home_zones_zone_capabilities' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary and description lack specificity about what capabilities are returned. Added context about temperature ranges, modes, and control features to help AI agents understand what information this operation provides and when to use it.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve zone capabilities and constraints
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the capabilities and constraints of a specified zone, including supported temperature ranges, heating modes, and control features. Returns a capability object defining what operations and settings are available for the zone. Requires home and zone identifiers.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description lack specificity about what capabilities are returned. Added context about temperature ranges, modes, and control features to help AI agents understand what information this operation provides and when to use it.

message: Operation 'get_homes_home_zones_zone_schedule_activeTimetable' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description doesn't explain what 'active' means or what data is returned. Added clarity that this returns the currently in-effect schedule (as opposed to other available schedules) and what information the response contains.

data.current_summary: Active schedule timetable of a zone
data.current_description: Active schedule timetable of a zone
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve currently active zone schedule
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the currently active timetable schedule for a specified zone. Returns the timetable object that is currently in effect, including its identifier and associated schedule blocks. This represents the zone's active heating schedule. Requires home and zone identifiers.
data.reasoning: Original description doesn't explain what 'active' means or what data is returned. Added clarity that this returns the currently in-effect schedule (as opposed to other available schedules) and what information the response contains.

message: Operation 'get_homes_home_zones_zone_schedule_timetables' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is too brief and doesn't clarify that this returns multiple timetables or what each timetable represents. Added context about the array response and that these are different schedule configurations available for the zone.

data.summary_suggestion: List all available zone schedules
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all available timetable schedules for a specified zone. Returns an array of timetable objects, each representing a different schedule configuration that can be applied to the zone. Requires home and zone identifiers.
data.reasoning: Original description is too brief and doesn't clarify that this returns multiple timetables or what each timetable represents. Added context about the array response and that these are different schedule configurations available for the zone.

message: Operation 'get_homes_home_zones_zone_schedule_timetables_timetable_blocks' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description doesn't explain what 'blocks' are in the scheduling context. Added clarity that blocks represent time periods with specific settings, and clarified the response structure and required parameters for AI agent understanding.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve schedule blocks for a timetable
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all schedule blocks (time periods with specific settings) for a specified timetable within a zone. Returns an array of timetable block objects, each defining a time period and its associated heating settings. Requires home, zone, and timetable identifiers.
data.reasoning: Original description doesn't explain what 'blocks' are in the scheduling context. Added clarity that blocks represent time periods with specific settings, and clarified the response structure and required parameters for AI agent understanding.

data.current_summary: Weather at location of a home

data.current_description: The User Profile endpoint returns information about the Tado user that has authorized with the application. This includes the home and mobiledevices.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve authenticated user profile and devices
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the profile information of the authenticated Tado user, including associated homes and mobile devices. Requires OAuth2 authentication. Returns a profile object containing user details, home references, and registered mobile devices.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity about authentication requirements and specific return structure. Enhanced version clarifies what data is returned and authentication mechanism for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'put_homes_home_zones_zone_overlay' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is acceptable but description is severely lacking. Enhanced description clarifies what an overlay is (temporary override), specifies required parameters, explains input/output, and describes side effects (persistence until deletion/expiration) for AI agent clarity.

data.description_suggestion: Creates or updates an overlay for a specific zone, allowing temporary override of the scheduled program. Requires home ID and zone ID parameters. Accepts overlay configuration in request body (temperature setpoint, duration, etc.). Returns the updated overlay object. This change persists until manually deleted or the overlay duration expires.
data.reasoning: Summary is acceptable but description is severely lacking. Enhanced description clarifies what an overlay is (temporary override), specifies required parameters, explains input/output, and describes side effects (persistence until deletion/expiration) for AI agent clarity.

message: Operation 'delete_homes_home_zones_zone_overlay' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and actionable. Description needs enhancement to specify required parameters, clarify return value, and explicitly state the side effect (immediate resumption of scheduled program) for better AI agent understanding of the operation's consequences.

data.current_summary: Delete overlay settings and return to scheduled program
data.current_description: Delete overlay settings and return to scheduled program
data.description_suggestion: Removes the active overlay for a specific zone, restoring the zone to its scheduled program. Requires home ID and zone ID parameters. Returns the updated zone state reflecting the removal of the overlay. The zone will immediately resume following its timetable schedule after this operation.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description needs enhancement to specify required parameters, clarify return value, and explicitly state the side effect (immediate resumption of scheduled program) for better AI agent understanding of the operation's consequences.
